ucs.title: [LLM] APT38 / Bluenoroff (TraderTraitor / AppleJeus) — trojanised cryptocurrency trading app spawning interpreter or LOLBin
ucs.description: Hunts the canonical Bluenoroff (Sapphire Sleet / Stardust Chollima) initial-access pattern: a victim is lured via fake recruiter / LinkedIn DM into installing a counterfeit cryptocurrency trading platform (Celas TradePro, JMTTrader, UnionCryptoTrader, CryptoNeuroTrader, Kupay Wallet, CoinGoTrade, Dafom, Ants2Whale, TraderTraitor, BloxHolder, etc.). The signed-but-trojanised installer or its bundled DLL spins up a PowerShell / rundll32 / curl / certutil child to fetch the next-stage backdoor (Manuscrypt / GhostSecret / KEYMARBLE / RustBucket-equivalent on Windows). Pairing the actor-specific pa
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("celastradepro.exe","jmttrader.exe","unioncryptotrader.exe","cryptoneurotrader.exe","kupaywallet.exe","coingotrade.exe","dafom.exe","ants2whale.exe","worldbit-bot.exe","iwebpro.exe","tradertraitor.exe","bloxholder.exe","esilet.exe","quickapp.exe") AND Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","curl.exe","bitsadmin.exe","certutil.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe") AND NOT Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE") by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.process_hash Processes.parent_process_path | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort -lastTime
ucs.kql:
let CryptoLures = dynamic(["celastradepro","jmttrader","unioncryptotrader","cryptoneurotrader","kupaywallet","coingotrade","dafom","ants2whale","worldbit-bot","iwebpro","tradertraitor","bloxholder","esilet","quickapp","cryptai"]);
let LurePathFragments = dynamic([@"\CelasTradePro\",@"\JMTTrader\",@"\UnionCryptoTrader\",@"\CryptoNeuroTrader\",@"\Kupay Wallet\",@"\CoinGoTrade\",@"\Ants2Whale\",@"\WorldBit-Bot\",@"\TraderTraitor\",@"\BloxHolder\"]);
let SuspiciousChildren = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","curl.exe","bitsadmin.exe","certutil.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(30d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| extend ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(InitiatingProcessFileName, ".")[0]))
| where ParentLeaf in (CryptoLures)
    or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (LurePathFragments)
    or InitiatingProcessVersionInfoProductName has_any ("Celas Trade","JMT Trader","UnionCryptoTrader","CryptoNeuroTrader","Kupay Wallet","TraderTraitor")
| where FileName in~ (SuspiciousChildren)
    or ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Invoke-WebRequest","DownloadString","-EncodedCommand","FromBase64String","-w hidden","-WindowStyle Hidden","IEX","Invoke-Expression")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentProduct = InitiatingProcessVersionInfoProductName,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ParentSHA256 = InitiatingProcessSHA256,
          ChildImage = FolderPath,
          ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          ChildSHA256 = SHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let CryptoLures = dynamic(["celastradepro","jmttrader","unioncryptotrader","cryptoneurotrader","kupaywallet","coingotrade","dafom","ants2whale","worldbit-bot","iwebpro","tradertraitor","bloxholder","esilet","quickapp"]);
let LurePathFragments = dynamic([@"\CelasTradePro\",@"\JMTTrader\",@"\UnionCryptoTrader\",@"\CryptoNeuroTrader\",@"\Kupay Wallet\",@"\CoinGoTrade\",@"\Ants2Whale\",@"\WorldBit-Bot\",@"\TraderTraitor\",@"\BloxHolder\"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, @"\")[-1]), ".")[0]))
| where ParentLeaf in (CryptoLures)
    or ParentProcessName has_any (LurePathFragments)
| where NewProcessName has_any (@"\powershell.exe",@"\pwsh.exe",@"\cmd.exe",@"\mshta.exe",@"\rundll32.exe",@"\regsvr32.exe",@"\curl.exe",@"\bitsadmin.exe",@"\certutil.exe",@"\wscript.exe",@"\cscript.exe")
    or CommandLine has_any ("Invoke-WebRequest","DownloadString","-EncodedCommand","FromBase64String","-w hidden","-WindowStyle Hidden")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT38 Bluenoroff TraderTraitor / AppleJeus Trojanised Crypto-Trader Spawns Interpreter or LOLBin
id: 5a1d4f1c-e2a6-4cf1-9e62-3e0a9b5cab38
status: experimental
description: Detects a known Bluenoroff/APT38 fake cryptocurrency trading application launching a script interpreter, signed-binary proxy, or download LOLBin — the canonical AppleJeus / TraderTraitor execution chain.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0082/
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa22-108a
  - https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/apt38-details-on-new-north-korean-regime-backed-threat-group
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/08
tags:
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1218.011
  - attack.g0082
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_parent_name:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\CelasTradePro.exe'
      - '\JMTTrader.exe'
      - '\UnionCryptoTrader.exe'
      - '\CryptoNeuroTrader.exe'
      - '\KupayWallet.exe'
      - '\CoinGoTrade.exe'
      - '\Dafom.exe'
      - '\Ants2Whale.exe'
      - '\WorldBit-Bot.exe'
      - '\iWebPro.exe'
      - '\TraderTraitor.exe'
      - '\BloxHolder.exe'
      - '\Esilet.exe'
      - '\QuickApp.exe'
  selection_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\regsvr32.exe'
      - '\curl.exe'
      - '\bitsadmin.exe'
      - '\certutil.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
  filter_machine_account:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: selection_parent_name and selection_child and not filter_machine_account
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate cryptocurrency desktop apps with similar names (verify signer / hash against known APT38 IoCs).
level: high
ucs.rationale: The parent-process allow-list is the AppleJeus / TraderTraitor binary set publicly attributed to APT38 / Bluenoroff by CISA AA22-108A, US-CERT MAR-10322463, Kaspersky and Mandiant. These applications have no legitimate enterprise need to spawn a script interpreter or download LOLBin — pairing the actor-specific parent with the interpreter/LOLBin child is what makes this distinct from generic 'Powe

ucs.title: [LLM] APT38 destructive cleanup chain — shadow-copy purge + boot-config tamper + raw PhysicalDrive write within a tight window
ucs.description: Hunts APT38's signature anti-forensics and wiper sequence used to cover SWIFT message manipulation in the Bank of Bangladesh, Banco de Chile, Far Eastern International, Bancomext and Vietnam TPBank heists: vssadmin/wmic shadow-copy deletion, bcdedit recovery disable, fsutil USN journal wipe, and a raw write to \\.\PhysicalDrive0 (MBR/VBR wiper a la KillDisk variant / Hermes-derived wiper) all on the same host within ~30 minutes. APT38's destructive stage is what differentiates them from purely-financial e-crime groups — they wipe to delay forensic reconstruction of fraudulent SWIFT MT103/202 t
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmd values(Processes.process_name) as proc values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where ((Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*" AND Processes.process="*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="fsutil.exe" AND Processes.process="*usn*" AND Processes.process="*deletejournal*") OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*no*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*")) OR Processes.process="*\\\\.\\PhysicalDrive0*" OR Processes.process="*\\\\.\\PHYSICALDRIVE0*") AND NOT Processes.user IN ("*$") by host Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.user _time span=1m | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | bin _time span=30m as bucket | stats min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime dc(process_name) as distinct_techniques values(process_name) as techniques values(process) as commands values(user) as users by host bucket | where distinct_techniques>=2 | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort -firstTime
ucs.kql:
let WindowMin = 30m;
let Wipers = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | extend Technique = case(
        FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"), "VSSAdminShadowDelete",
        FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadowcopy" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete", "WMICShadowDelete",
        FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("catalog","systemstatebackup","backup"), "WbAdminBackupDelete",
        FileName =~ "fsutil.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "usn" and ProcessCommandLine has "deletejournal", "USNJournalWipe",
        FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and (ProcessCommandLine has "recoveryenabled" and ProcessCommandLine has "no"), "BcdRecoveryDisable",
        FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "bootstatuspolicy" and ProcessCommandLine has "ignoreallfailures", "BcdBootPolicyTamper",
        ProcessCommandLine has_any (@"\\.\PhysicalDrive0", @"\\.\PHYSICALDRIVE0", @"\Device\Harddisk0\DR0"), "RawDiskWrite",
        "")
    | where isnotempty(Technique)
    | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, Technique, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
Wipers
| summarize Techniques = make_set(Technique),
            DistinctTechniques = dcount(Technique),
            Commands = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 25),
            Parents = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen = max(Timestamp)
            by DeviceName, DeviceId, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, WindowMin)
| where DistinctTechniques >= 2
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let WindowMin = 30m;
let Wipers = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend Img = tolower(NewProcessName), Cmd = tolower(CommandLine)
    | extend Technique = case(
        Img endswith @"\vssadmin.exe" and Cmd has_all ("delete","shadows"), "VSSAdminShadowDelete",
        Img endswith @"\wmic.exe" and Cmd has "shadowcopy" and Cmd has "delete", "WMICShadowDelete",
        Img endswith @"\wbadmin.exe" and Cmd has "delete" and Cmd has_any ("catalog","systemstatebackup","backup"), "WbAdminBackupDelete",
        Img endswith @"\fsutil.exe" and Cmd has "usn" and Cmd has "deletejournal", "USNJournalWipe",
        Img endswith @"\bcdedit.exe" and Cmd has "recoveryenabled" and Cmd has "no", "BcdRecoveryDisable",
        Img endswith @"\bcdedit.exe" and Cmd has "bootstatuspolicy" and Cmd has "ignoreallfailures", "BcdBootPolicyTamper",
        Cmd has_any (@"\\.\physicaldrive0", @"\device\harddisk0\dr0"), "RawDiskWrite",
        "")
    | where isnotempty(Technique)
    | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName, Technique;
Wipers
| summarize Techniques = make_set(Technique),
            DistinctTechniques = dcount(Technique),
            Commands = make_set(CommandLine, 25),
            Parents = make_set(ParentProcessName),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
            by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, WindowMin)
| where DistinctTechniques >= 2
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: While each individual command (vssadmin, bcdedit, fsutil, raw drive write) appears in many wiper / ransomware playbooks, the COMBINATION of shadow-copy purge + recovery tamper + raw \\.\PhysicalDrive0 write within a 30-minute window on a non-administrative interactive session is the signature APT38 cleanup chain reported by FireEye/Mandiant ('APT38: Un-usual Suspects'), CISA AA20-239A (BeagleBoyz)
